subject: fix(ui): burger menu position and alpha pill rendering on web
body:
Burger menu Modal backdrop lacked explicit full-screen positioning on web,
causing the absolute-positioned menu card to anchor incorrectly (left side
instead of below the button). Fixed with position: fixed on web backdrop.

Alpha badge pill background (bg-primary className) wasn't rendering on web,
making it look like highlighted text. Switched to inline StyleSheet styles
with useTheme colors for reliable cross-platform rendering.

Tags: ui, pwa, web
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-fixes
